name: Hatchling
desc: A young Locust that specializes drawing blood and providing blood samples.

abilities.name: Nibble
abilities.effect: Attack a Target within Range.

abilities.name: Envenom
abilities.prereqs: _Graze_+ with a _Natural_ Weapon and the Attack and the Target lost any _Stamina_.
abilities.effect: Add _Poisoned_ 1 to the Attack.

stances.name: Swarm
stances.desc: You surge forward in a mindless swarm.
stances.effect: _Engage_ the nearest enemy, or the closest you can become _Engaged_ with that is already _Engaged_ with a _Locust_. Use Nibble against the enemy.

name: Biter Nymph
desc: A young Locust that specializes drawing blood and providing blood samples.

abilities.name: Latch
abilities.effect: Attack a Target within Range.

abilities.name: Drink
abilities.target: A creature you are grappling or riding.
abilities.effect: Attack a Target within Range. Restore all _Guard_ on a _Hit_+. If you _Wound_ them, gain a Blood Sample and inflict an additional _Minor Blood Loss_ _Wound_.

abilities.name: Envenom
abilities.prereqs: _Graze_+ with a _Natural_ Weapon and the Attack and the Target lost any _Stamina_.
abilities.effect: Add _Poisoned_ 1 to the Attack.

stances.name: Find Sample
stances.desc: You find a target, attempting to latch onto them.
stances.effect: _Engage_ the lowest _Stamina_ creature within Range that you do not have a Blood Sample from. In case of a tie, prioritize the closer. Then, use Latch. If you cannot, instead _Concentrate_.

stances.name: Take Sample
stances.desc: You drill deep on a grappled target, attempting to extract a sample of their essence.
stances.effect: Use Drink on a creature you are _Riding_ or _Grappling_. If you are not _Riding_ or _Grappling_ a creature, gain _Exposed_, attempt to _Engage_ a creature, then _Concentrate_.

stances.name: Return Sample
stances.desc: You dash away from an enemy, attempting to get a blood sample to an appropriate ally.
stances.effect: _Retreat_, then attempt to _Engage_ with a Chemist. If you do, give them all Blood Samples you have.

name: Needler Nymph
desc: A young Locust that specializes in firing pressurized spines.

abilities.name: Needle Shot
abilities.effect: Attack a Target within Range.

abilities.name: Envenom
abilities.prereqs: _Graze_+ with a _Natural_ Weapon and the Attack dealt at least 1 Damage.
abilities.effect: Add _Poisoned_ 1 to the Attack.

stances.name: Needle
stances.desc: You take a shot at an enemy, attempting to strike them down from a distance.
stances.effect: If you are not _Engaged_, make an Attack with _Needle Shot_ against the most isolated enemy that is not in _Cover_, choosing between equivalent targets the case of a tie. You may then _Retreat_. If you are _Engaged_, instead gain +2 _Speed_ and _Retreat_.

stances.name: Snipe
stances.desc: You take careful aim, attempting to shoot down a foe from a distance.
stances.effect: At _Respite_, choose a Target, announcing it to the table. On your _Turn_, use _Needle Shot_ against the Target at _Advantage_, dealing +_1/2/3/4_ Damage. You may then _Retreat_. If you are _Engaged_, instead gain +2 _Speed_ and _Retreat_.

stances.name: Relocate
stances.desc: You take a shot at an enemy, attempting to strike them down from a distance.
stances.effect: _Retreat_, then attempt to move to the highest _Elevation_ possible. You may _Engage_ _Cover_, if available.

name: Hive Guardian
desc: A Locust that specializes in defending the warren, blocking paths and restraining foes.

abilities.name: Grasping Claw
abilities.effect: Attack a Target within Range.

abilities.name: Wrath
abilities.effect: Whenever an ally dies, deal +1 Damage on your next attack. This effect stacks, up to a maximum of +6.

abilities.name: Rend
abilities.effect: When you start your turn _Grabbing_ a creature, deal 3 _Slash_ Damage to them.

abilities.name: Armor Plating
abilities.effect: You do not have _Disadvantage_ to _Parry_ Ranged Attacks. If this is _Shattered_, add [_Pierce_ 2] to all Attacks against you.

abilities.name: Envenom
abilities.prereqs: _Graze_+ with a _Natural_ Weapon and the Attack dealt at least 1 Damage.
abilities.effect: Add _Poisoned_ 1 to the Attack.

abilities.name: Perfect Parry
abilities.effect: The triggering Attack is _Glancing_. If you are in a _Defensive_ _Stance_ _Cost_ is instead None.

stances.name: Warden
stances.desc: You move to limit mobility through an arena, preparing to pounce.
stances.effect: On your _Turn_, you either _Recover_ and gain 4 _Guard_ or gain +2 _Speed_ and _Speed_ to an adjacent _Arena_. The next time a creature enters your _Arena_ or stops being _Engaged_ with you you may immediately Move to _Engage_ them then strike them twice with Grasping Claw as a _Reaction_.

stances.name: Guardian
stances.desc: You move to an ally, defending them against all incoming attacks.
stances.effect: On your _Turn_, Move to become _Engaged_ with an ally. While you are _Engaged_ with them all Attacks against them have _Disadvantage_, and you may use your _Defend_ Reactions for them; if you do, distribute the effect equally between you and the creature you are defending.

stances.name: Charge
stances.desc: You dart forward, attempting to engage and restrain a hostile creature.
stances.effect: On your _Turn_, Move to become _Engaged_ with the nearest enemy. You may _Brawl_ against them, choosing either <u>Slam</u> or <u>Overpower</u>. You may then become re-_Engaged_ if required, then use _Grasping Claw_.

stances.name: Avenger
stances.desc: You focus fire on an enemy that harmed one of your allies.
stances.effect: On your _Turn_, Move to become _Engaged_ with the nearest enemy that targeted the beneficiary of your Guardian Stance last turn or _Defeated_ one of your allies this or last _Round_. Make three Grasping Claw Attacks against them.

stances.name: Recover
stances.desc: You catch your guard.
stances.effect: On your _Turn_, _Recover_ or gain 4 _Guard_ three times, choosing an effect each time. You may then _Retreat_.

name: Hive Chemist
desc: A dangerous Locust that can cultivate and expel deadly toxins.

abilities.name: Gas Sack
abilities.effect: Whenever you take Damage from a _Slash_, _Stab_, or _Crush_ effect all creatures _Engaged_ with you take 2 _Poison_ _Damage_. This Damage ignores _Block_ and instead treats _Grit_ as _Block_. If _Downed_, instead inflict _Poisoned_ 2.

abilities.name: Envenom
abilities.prereqs: _Graze_+ with a _Natural_ Weapon and the Attack dealt at least 1 Damage.
abilities.effect: Add _Poisoned_ 1 to the Attack.

abilities.name: Pheromone Spike
abilities.effect: Choose an ally within Range. They gain 2 _Speed_ that they must immediately spend, gain 4 _Guard_, and immediately _Recover_.
abilities.special: If you have any Mutations, the target gains them.

abilities.name: Pheromone Mark
abilities.effect: Choose an enemy within Range; they must immediately _Negate_ [_Reflex_ 10]. Inflict _Studied_, and the next Attack against them gains [_Pierce_ 2]. Regardless, they take 1 _Poison_ Damage.

abilities.name: Synthesis
abilities.effect: Consume the Blood Sample. For the rest of the Scene, whenever you use an effect that would deal _Poison_ Damage to the Target, deal +4 Damage. If you would inflict _Poisoned_, inflict 2 more. You gain this effect at half potency for all creatures of the same creature type (same spirit element, human, etc.). After, use Pheromone Spike on the nearest two allies.

abilities.name: Molt
abilities.effect: Choose a Damage Type you have used Adaptive Carapace against. Gain a Mutation that increases your _Resistance_ to that Damage by one step. You may not use this ability against that Damage Type again this _Scene_.

abilities.name: Adaptive Carapace
abilities.effect: Gain +2 _Block_ against the triggering Attack. Note the Damage Type; you may use Molt against that effect.

abilities.name: Mutation Cloud
abilities.effect: Create a Mutation Cloud (Terrain, Weather, Fleeting). Any creature that ends their turn in this takes 2 Poison Damage, but, if they are a Locust, they gain all your Mutations at the time of creating this cloud.

abilities.name: Venom Spray
abilities.effect: Attack a Target within Range.

stances.name: Field Chemist
stances.desc: You adapt your form on the fly, creating a more vicious evolution.
stances.effect: Use Molt or Synthesis. After, use Pheromone Spike on the nearest two allies or Mutation Cloud.

stances.name: Pheromone Spread
stances.desc: You spew pheromone markers, enhancing your allies and marking foes for death.
stances.effect: Either use Pheromone Spike or Pheromone Mark three times in any combo, or use one all creatures in an _Engagement_. Enemies take 1 _Poison_ Damage from Pheromone Spike, allies take 1 _Poison_ Damage from Pheromone Mark.

stances.name: Recover
stances.desc: You take a moment to gather yourself, potentially increasing your armor.
stances.effect: You may _Recover_ or gain 4 _Guard_, then may either repeat that effect twice or use Molt. You may then _Retreat_.

stances.name: Chemical Warrior
stances.desc: You spew noxious chemical, attacking nearby foes.
stances.effect: On your _Turn_, _Retreat_ then use Venom Spray, prioritizing targets you have a Mutation against, otherwise targeting the nearest.

stances.name: Pursue Mutation
stances.desc: You pursue mutation, attempting to add to your arsenal.
stances.effect: You may _Retreat_, then attempt to move towards the nearest Queen or Mutation Cloud, if available. If you enter it, do not take any Poison Damage and instead gain 4 _Guard_.

name: Fledgling Queen
desc: A Queen that, while not fully grown, is large enough to sustain her own hive.

abilities.name: Boss
abilities.effect: In addition to your primary Stance, choose a secondary stance with the 'Minor' keyword. Whenever you gain a [_Discount_], increase the value by 1.

abilities.name: Armor Plating
abilities.effect: You do not have _Disadvantage_ to _Parry_ Ranged Attacks. If this is _Shattered_, add [_Pierce_ 2] to all Attacks against you.

abilities.name: Spawn
abilities.effect: Create two Hatchlings. Any Mutations you have are automatically shared with the Hatchlings.

abilities.name: Regalia
abilities.effect: Allies in your _Arena_ gain a +1 to all _Rolls_.

abilities.name: Queen's Cry
abilities.effect: Choose an ally within Range. They may immediately Move 2, then Attack [_Discount_ 2] the Attacker.

abilities.name: Envenom
abilities.prereqs: _Graze_+ with a _Natural_ Weapon and the Attack and the Target lost any _Stamina_.
abilities.effect: Add _Poisoned_ 1 to the Attack.

abilities.name: Scything Claw
abilities.effect: Attack a Target within Range.

stances.name: Rapid Reproduction
stances.desc: You focus on growing the hive, spawning a large number of hatchlings.
stances.effect: Use _Spawn_ three times. If you are _Engaged_ with a hostile creature, instead only use it once.

stances.name: Queen's Wrath
stances.desc: You lash out, unleashing devastating attacks with your scythes.
stances.effect: Use Scything Claw twice. If a creature is _Engaged_ with you, one must be against them.

stances.name: Regenerate
stances.desc: You attempt to move, dragging yourself across the map.
stances.effect: _Recover_ twice, then regain all _Guard_.

stances.name: Crawl
stances.desc: You attempt to move, dragging yourself across the map.
stances.effect: You may move freely this _Turn_.

stances.name: Clutch
stances.desc: You quickly create some new hatchlings.
stances.effect: Use _Spawn_.

stances.name: Strike
stances.desc: You lash out with your scything claws.
stances.effect: Use Scything Claw against a creature within range, prioritizing those _Engaged_ with you.

stances.name: Rest
stances.desc: You catch your breath and recover.
stances.effect: _Recover_, then gain 6 _Guard_.
